/tmp/codeql-scratch-42421b51d372e5d9/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--no-undefined -static-libstdc++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/snmallocshim-checks.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libsnmallocshim-checks.so -o libsnmallocshim-checks.so "CMakeFiles/snmallocshim-checks.dir/src/snmalloc/override/malloc.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/snmallocshim-checks.dir/src/snmalloc/override/new.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/snmallocshim-checks.dir/src/snmalloc/override/memcpy.cc.o"  -latomic
